headline: Here Are Thursday’s Best Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Align Technology, American Tower, Caesars Entertainment, Cohu, Five Below, Intuitive Surgical, Salesforce, Toast, and More
summary: Pre-Market Stock Futures: Futures are trading mixed after another tough day across Wall Street, with all the major indices crushed early on, before the Nasdaq made a late-afternoon push to wind up just modestly higher at 25,870, up 0.20%. The S&P 500 also rallied in the afternoon, erasing a big deficit, to finish the session ... headline: Can American International Group (AIG) Justify Its Price After A 92% Run?
summary: American International Group stock has delivered a strong 92.2% return over the past five years, yet its recent weakness this year and a low overall value score suggest the shares may no longer be an obvious bargain at around US$79.62. Over five years, American International Group has returned 92.2%, which sets a high bar for any further upside from here. Upcoming earnings and ongoing underwriting improvements can support sentiment, while execution on acquisitions and underwriting discipline...
